rationale: Educ. Code §61.076 governs the P-16 Council's composition and coordination duties. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax amounts, or school funding formulas affected by the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change.
quote: Sec. 61.076. P-16 COUNCIL. (a) It is the policy of the State of Texas that the entire system of education supported with public funds be coordinated to provide the citizens with efficient, effective, and high quality educational services and activities.
_note: No conflict found. This statute addresses the P-16 Council's structure and coordination responsibilities, not property tax exemptions or school finance calculations.
